body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
After #1730, CMIP is stable for 1+ year with the ED only atmosphere setup. We should test it with more complex atmospheres too to see how it does.

Note that stability seems to be independent of the land model type (as in AMIP too), so I only added integrated land longruns. We can probably remove the bucket longrun too but I left it for now so we can lay eyes on it passing at 1 year.


## To-do
- [x] add 2 new longruns
- [x] update existing CMIP longruns to use longer dts for ocean/sea ice and save monthly diagnostics
- [x] fix typo in benchmarks table (unrelated to the other changes)


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: add CMIP longruns with more complex atmospheres

title: up deps; use SurfaceFluxes v1

body:
- For this weekend scheduled longruns I want to swap ED only run with prognostic EDMF 1M run. And see how stable it actually is, after all the fixes from the last two weeks.
- I also want to use ARS343 when running with diagnostic EDMF. It seems to be more stable
title: Config updates
